title: ervatamia cumingiana
intro: Ervatamia cumingiana, also known as the Philippine alangium, is a type of plant species native to the Philippines. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Ervatamia cumingiana include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Ervatamia cumingiana can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies in the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia.
